title: Carving Tools, 18 in 1 Wood Whittling Kit, Chip Carving Kit with 8PCS Basswood Blocks Set, 6PCS Whittling Knives, Gloves, Canvas Bag, Sharpener, Carving Set for Beginners Kids
features: ⭐【18PCS Complete Wood Carving Kit】Professional wood whittling kit for beginners includes 8 basswood wood blocks, 3 whittling knives, 3 detail wood carving knives, 1 pair of cut-resistant gloves, leather strop, polishing compound and a portable tool roll bag for storing instruments.

👍【Ergonomic Wood Whittling Knives】Our wood carving knife blades are made of high-quality steel, which is high hardness and corrosion-resistant, making them easy to use. Comes with a built-in iron buckle to secure the blade in place, prevent the blade and handle from breaking. Paired with an ergonomic round handle design, made of walnut and feels comfortable in your hand, allowing you to work for hours without fatigue.

💪【High Quality Natural Basswood Blocks】Each wood carving knife kit includes 8 pcs all-natural and harmless basswood blocks, which are lightweight and easy to carve and stain. Whittling kits can be used to create a variety of unique arts and crafts such as spoons, rabbits, cats, dogs, bears and other wooden crafts.

💯【Perfect and Lightweight Set Match】Each wood whittling kit comes with a portable roll-up storage bag for easy storage and portability. Cut-resistant gloves protect your hands from cuts and scrapes. Polishing compound and leather strop protect the blade from rusting, making it smoother and sharper.

💥【Wide Application】Our wood carving set can be given as a gift to children, beginners and professionals. It can be used for woodworking, carving, cutting, modeling, scraping and texturing, as well as pumpkin carving, soapstone projects, crafts and more. Your satisfaction is very important to Yexati - if a product does not meet your expectations, please contact us directly for a replacement.
